description_long: This camper features a boxy, retro design with a teal blue body and a contrasting red cab at the front. The roof is a smooth, light gray, slightly curved structure that extends over the main living compartment. Large rectangular windows are present on both sides, providing visibility and light to the interior, while the front cab has a wide windshield and side mirrors. The wheels are white-rimmed and robust, suitable for urban and light off-road travel. The rear of the camper is flat, with no visible entry door, suggesting side access. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet charming, with visible wear and subtle metallic accents.
description: A retro teal and red camper with a curved gray roof, large side windows, and a robust, boxy build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal body, large rectangular window, red cab, and white-rimmed wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red cab, wide windshield, side mirrors, and grille details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar large window and visible cab, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat back with no visible door, and the continuation of the teal and gray color scheme.
attribute_window_configuration: one large rectangular window on each side, no visible front or rear windows
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
